subject: Re: G4's pricing recap.
body:
what is the price for the g2b  , I need a test flight
, in thelimited g4 and maybe offer 22.5-23 plus G2
B.Ask Tim for his tax consequences on sale..they might
want me to buy the global, then swap for g4

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> Info obtained from Sean's spread sheet.
> s/n 1499 ask 28.9M (under contract 27.5M
> unconfirmed) 1200 hours only. no 
> HUD.
> s/n 1462 ask 27.7M sold 27M
> s/n 1464 ask 28.5M sold 27.3M
> s/n 1452 ask 28.250M sold 27.5M
> s/n 1422 ask 28.5M sold 27.5M
> s/n 1417 ask 26.9M sold 26.4M
> My opinion Limited's s/n 1449 - worth 27M at most.
> Larry V
